calls.title: AL Rayan - Survey, Utilities & Waste Management
calls.summary: Working session focused on designing automated utility and waste data collection for AL Rayan sites, using workflows and monthly work orders to replace manual HOD reminders. Survey module scoped to support standalone and WO-linked campaigns with dropdown/emoji options.

Work orders per site/asset for monthly data population; consolidated dashboard reporting
Survey module: integrated with WO completion or standalone campaigns
IoT integration deferred; immediate focus on manual data entry

Standardised data collection and reporting framework for all entities and sites

Define survey structure (standalone vs WO-linked, dropdown options)

calls.title: Modon AM Farvision Meeting

PPM notifications: Facilio notifies Farvision to inform tenants

Integration scope confirmed: SR, PPM notifications, chargeable work

calls.summary: Large cross-functional Modon session scoping a unified utility and waste management data collection framework across FM, AM, and CM entities. Key requirement: reconcile on-site meter readings with official utility bills (Taka, ADDC) for ESG and financial accuracy.

Bill reconciliation: on-site readings vs official utility bills for ESG and financial reporting
Alerts for consumption discrepancies exceeding threshold (+/-10%)

calls.title: Facilio/Imperial Touchbase
calls.summary: Commercial and go-live discussion that surfaced sustained customer frustration over missed delivery milestones since contract signing in September. Sathya committed Facilio to 5-10 man-weeks of development for invoicing credit-netting and Phase 1 integration items. Jeffrey declined to commit to a subscription start date until the product is delivered and tested, but explicitly confirmed his commitment to go-live once it works.
key_points: Amendment: billing for inactive sites - compromise agreed (track, don't charge if decommissioned in quarter)
Phase 1 blocker: invoicing credit-netting requires 5-10 man-weeks development
Jeffrey refused subscription start date commitment until product works end-to-end
Past milestones: January 1 and April 1 go-live dates both missed

Jeffrey confirmed: 'If you provide them and they work, we go live. There's no argument from me.'
decisions: Inactive sites billing: track but not charge if decommissioned in quarter

Facilio to provide delivery ETA; Imperial to commit to start date upon confirmation
